title: Hunt for Osamiron
description: This mission lasts for one month.
body:
With the Cultist question dealt with, we are once more free to pursuit the man whose deeds brought about the foundation of our Order in the first place: Osamiron. Six months ago, he was last seen in company of a previously unknown follower, attacking the Red Rose at the Open-Air Theatre of Thais. He hasn't been seen or heard of since then.

Your objectives are to...
- Gather intelligence on Osamiron's movements since then.
- Investigate the identity of the unknown follower.
- Recover artifacts that may potentially be turned to evil purposes.

title: Measuring Vandura
description: This mission lasts for one month.
body:
The riches of the Shattered Isles draws adventurers and factions to seek their fortune in Vandura. We must not let outsiders get there before us. Patrol its lands and report your findings to the Wardens.

Resources of value are to be claimed in the name of the Order and returned to the Mountain Hideout. Crush any who actively oppose the Gryphon's lawful authority.

Complete the full discovery of...
- Vandura Cultist Hideout.
- Liberty Bay City.
- Liberty Bay Surroundings.

title: Empower the Gryphon
description: This edict lasts for six months.
body:
The Argent Gryphon is sovereign and feared, but reputation alone is not enough. If we hope to maintain our sphere of influence, our focus must be to bolster our strength.

During this period, the Order shall increase its numbers through the recruitment of worthy initiates, strengthen its ties to the Circle of Stonehaze and Summerhaven, and seek cooperation with new allies.
